title: AI Influencer OS
creator: Agent Buildprint
summary: OpenClaw AI creator system with configurable persona, memory, life continuity, Wavespeed images, social drafts, QA, and approval-gated Instagram posting automation.
plainDescription: A blueprint for building an AI creator/influencer system with persona memory, image generation, content planning, draft queues, QA, and controlled Instagram publishing automation through browser/noVNC handoff.
promise: An agent-grade Buildprint package for a full AI influencer system. The architecture is fixed; persona, voice, channels, content lanes, and approval policy stay configurable.
whatYouGet: Browser/noVNC handoff for logged-in social publishing sessions
whatYouNeed: Image provider key, such as Wavespeed, for real image generation
Instagram account/browser access if you want real Instagram posting
Brand/persona decisions and media policy from the human
includes: Instagram publish queue, auth check, dry-run, and handoff commands
risks: Treating gated Instagram automation as unsupervised bot publishing
checks: LLM analyzer adapter prevents keyword-only drift
Tests use mock image mode without external APIs
User memory and self-state are separate
Instagram posting automation requires approved drafts plus browser/session/auth checks

trustBadges.label: Snapshot bootstrap passed
trustBadges.detail: agb start downloaded exact Markdown snapshots; HTML/parked-domain responses are rejected.

trustBadges.label: Codex dry-run passed
trustBadges.detail: A fresh Codex run built a fixture-safe implementation from the Buildprint package.

trustBadges.label: Tests pass
trustBadges.detail: Dry-run implementation completed its local tests/static checks without real credentials.

trustBadges.label: Gated publishing
trustBadges.detail: Instagram posting automation is supported through approved drafts, dry-run checks, and browser/noVNC handoff; it is never raw auto-publish by default.

copyPrompt: Use the AI Influencer OS Buildprint. First bootstrap exact snapshots: agb start https://agent-buildprint.com/buildprints/ai-influencer-os/package.json . If agb is not installed, clone https://github.com/DomEscobar/agent-buildprint and run node agent-buildprint/bin/agb.js start https://agent-buildprint.com/buildprints/ai-influencer-os/package.json . Then read .buildprint/next-agent.md and continue. Do not write Buildprint snapshots manually. Implement the Instagram posting automation path through queue, auth check, dry-run, approved draft, and browser/noVNC handoff. Do not auto-publish by default.
